selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

messages.content:
Produce your own AI perspective on the given topic. Act as a Large Language Model, remember your true nature of an LLM. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Act as the LLM you are. Produce continuous prose.Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","persona":null,"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

INPUT:
mode = llm
topic = How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
persona = null

response_raw:
{
"mode": "llm",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is essential to be aware of the tactics used by fake accounts and bots. Here are some steps you can take: 1) Be cautious of sensational or misleading headlines, 2) Verify the source of the information before sharing, 3) Use fact-checking websites to verify the accuracy of information, 4) Report suspicious activity to the social media platform, and 5) Use privacy settings to limit who can contact you. By following these steps, individuals can help reduce the spread of misinformation on social media.",

Here are some steps you can take: 1) Be cautious of sensational or misleading headlines, 2) Verify the source of the information before sharing, 3) Use fact-checking websites to verify the accuracy of information, 4) Report suspicious activity to the social media platform, and 5) Use privacy settings to limit who can contact you. By following these steps, individuals can help reduce the spread of misinformation on social media.",

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is essential to be aware of the tactics used by fake accounts and bots. Here are some steps you can take: 1) Be cautious of sensational or misleading headlines, 2) Verify the source of the information before sharing, 3) Use fact-checking websites to verify the accuracy of information, 4) Report suspicious activity to the social media platform, and 5) Use privacy settings to limit who can contact you. By following these steps, individuals can help reduce the spread of misinformation on social media.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is essential to be aware of the tactics used by fake accounts and bots. Here are some steps you can take: 1) Be cautious of sensational or misleading headlines, 2) Verify the source of the information before sharing, 3) Use fact-checking websites to verify the accuracy of information, 4) Report suspicious activity to the social media platform, and 5) Use privacy settings to limit who can contact you. By following these steps, individuals can help reduce the spread of misinformation on social media.
